zh.lifeSummary: 當Michael de la Pole II於1367年出生在英國越可爾赫爾時，他的父親Michael de la Pole I38歲，母親Catherine Wingfield19歲。他於1391年11月23日與Katherine Stafford在英國素福爾可科頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年9月17日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可文費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Michael de la Pole II于1367年出生在英国越可爾赫爾时，他的父亲Michael de la Pole I38岁，母亲Catherine Wingfield19岁。他于1391年11月23日与Katherine Stafford在英国素福爾可科頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年9月17日在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可文費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Pole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .
Americanized form of German   Pohle   or   Pohl  .

variants.name: Poles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Livio, Primo, Santo.
English and Welsh: variant of Pole and Powell + genitival or excrescent -s.
Italian (Friuli and Veneto): probably a derivative of the personal name   Polo  . It is also found in Slovenia.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: Michael
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Michael de la Pole II was born in 1367, in Hull, Yorkshire, England, his father, Michael de la Pole I, was 38 and his mother, Catherine Wingfield, was 19. He married Katherine Stafford on 23 November 1391, in Cotton, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 17 September 1415, in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Wingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Michael de la Pole II est né en 1367, à Hull, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Michael de la Pole I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Catherine Wingfield, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Stafford le 23 novembre 1391, à Cotton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1415, à Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Michael de la Pole II 1367 in Hull, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael de la Pole I 38 und seine Mutter Catherine Wingfield 19. Er hat am 23. November 1391 in Cotton, Suffolk, England Katherine Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1415 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Wingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

Lui sposato Katherine Stafford il 23 novembre 1391, nel Cotton, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1415, nel Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Wingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Michael de la Pole IIが1367年にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルで生まれた時，父Michael de la Pole Iは38歳，母Catherine Wingfieldは19歳であった。1391年11月23日にイギリススフォルクコットオンでKatherine Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年9月17日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハーフレウルで48歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウィングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Michael de la Pole II(이)가 1367년 영국 요르크실르 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael de la Pole I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Wingfield(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1391년 11월 23일 영국 수폴크 컷에서 Katherine Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 9월 17일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 하르플레우르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 윙필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Michael de la Pole II nasceu em 1367, em Hull, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Michael de la Pole I, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Wingfield, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Stafford em 23 de novembro de 1391, em Cotton, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1415, em Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Michael de la Pole II родился в 1367 г. в местности хулл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Michael de la Pole I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Wingfield, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Stafford 23 ноября 1391 г. в местности коттон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1415 г. в местности харфлеур, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1415, en Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
